summary.zh-CN: 变更说明: 完善了 HagiPower / Hero 相关功能与界面，提升角色进度、展示和操作体验。
summary.en: Change Summary: Expanded HagiPower / Hero features and UI to improve progression, presentation, and interaction experience.

bodyHtml.zh-CN:
产品改进

完善了 HagiPower / Hero 相关功能与界面

  • 变更说明: 完善了 HagiPower / Hero 相关功能与界面，提升角色进度、展示和操作体验。
  • 影响范围: 影响 角色与职业元数据、types 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

补充了配置、接口和多语言等配套支持

  • 变更说明: 补充了配置、接口和多语言等配套支持，提升整体功能可用性。
  • 影响范围: 影响 Web 客户端流程、types 相关功能、API 与生成契约。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

会话、消息和运行状态相关体验

  • 变更说明: 增强了会话、消息和运行状态相关体验，让上下文查看与过程反馈更清晰。
  • 影响范围: 影响 会话流程、types 相关功能、API 与生成契约。
  • 使用方式: 继续使用现有入口即可，升级到该版本后相关改进会自动生效。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

问题修复

项目与工作区相关链路

  • 变更说明: 优化了项目与工作区相关链路，减少切换和打开过程中的使用障碍。
  • 影响范围: 影响 Web 客户端流程、types 相关功能、API 与生成契约。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

模型与 Provider 相关配置细节

  • 变更说明: 优化了模型与 Provider 相关配置细节，减少接入和使用过程中的问题。
  • 影响范围: 影响 Web 客户端流程、types 相关功能、API 与生成契约。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。
bodyHtml.en:
Product Improvements

HagiPower / Hero features

  • Change Summary: Expanded HagiPower / Hero features and UI to improve progression, presentation, and interaction experience.
  • Impact: Affects hero and role metadata, Types.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Supporting work

  • Change Summary: Added supporting work across configuration, APIs, and localization to improve overall feature readiness.
  • Impact: Affects kanban and project views, web client flows, Types.
  • How to Use: Keep using the existing supporting work entry points; the improved behavior appears automatically after upgrading to this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Session

  • Change Summary: Enhanced session, message, and runtime visibility to make context and progress easier to follow.
  • Impact: Affects session workflows, kanban and project views, Types.
  • How to Use: Keep using the existing session entry points; the improved behavior appears automatically after upgrading to this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Fixes

Project and workspace flows

  • Change Summary: Refined project and workspace flows to reduce friction when switching or opening code targets.
  • Impact: Affects web client flows.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Model and provider configuration details

  • Change Summary: Improved model and provider configuration details to reduce integration and usage issues.
  • Impact: Affects web client flows.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.
